def: A domesticated carnivorous mammal kept as a pet or for work.
The star at the centre of our solar system.
A shaped covering for the head.
A round fruit, usually red, green or yellow, that grows on trees.
A white or grey mass of water drops floating high in the sky.
Ready to face and endure danger or pain; showing courage.
A hot glowing body of ignited gas generated by burning.
Hard solid non-metallic mineral matter of which rock is made.
A structure built over a river or road so people or vehicles can cross.
A large imaginary creature that can fly and breathes fire.
A large area of land covered with many trees and plants.
A celestial body moving in an elliptical orbit around a star.
A large medieval building, typically of the medieval period, kept by a noble.
